description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior is primarily clad in reddish-brown brick, with white-framed windows arranged in a regular pattern on all sides. The front features a covered balcony on the upper floor, supported by columns, and an open porch area below, both furnished with seating. The house sits on a green lawn with a partial wooden fence along one side, and the rear includes a simple back door and additional windows. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and corridors, with some furniture and fixtures discernible. The overall appearance is functional and straightforward, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A two-story, flat-roofed brick house with a covered balcony, regular window arrangement, and a simple, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered balcony, open porch, and main entrance with visible seating and interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a long brick wall with regularly spaced windows and a partial view of the balcony and porch.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a simple back door, several windows, and the green lawn extending behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, a partial wooden fence, and a clear view of the house's rectangular shape.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with covered porch and balcony above, supported by columns, featuring simple doors and minimal decorative elements.
